title: Fix 'for' loop with outside variable reference

features.name: while loop with outside variable in array index
features.description: Code should include a while loop that uses a module-level integer variable in an array index expression where the index depends on the loop variable being modified

features.name: parameterized array indexed by loop variable in while loop
features.description: Code should include a parameterized module with an array sized by parameter, where a while loop uses a module-scope integer in the array index expression
